news.t: It's Rough Out There. But These 5 Funds Are Crushing It.
Best ETFs to Buy in a Recession for August 2022
QMOM ETF Ranked Best Among US Momentum Smart Beta ETFs

holdings.infoBox: QMOM is an equity ETF with a total of 52 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dell Technologies stock at 2.64%, ATI Inc. at 2.37%, TD SYNNEX at 2.35%, Cummins at 2.19%, and FormFactor at 2.19%.

overview.description: The Alpha Architect U.S. Quantitative Momentum ETF (QMOM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the QMOM-US - No underlying index. The fund is an active, equal-weighted portfolio of US stocks, screened for their strong and consistent momentum. QMOM was launched on Dec 2, 2015 and is issued by Alpha Architect.
